_comment: Human operator attestation record. Required before PR merge or deployment. Created by scripts/create-attestation.ts.
attestation_statement: I, kyle.makinen, attest that I personally executed the above test commands on git ref abc1234, observed the results in real-time, and confirm that all tests passed as documented. The log files referenced above contain the complete, unmodified output of each test run.

signature._comment: GPG detached signature of the canonical JSON (attestation_statement + tests_executed, deterministically serialized). Created by: gpg --detach-sign --armor --output attestation.sig attestation-payload.json. Validated by scripts/validate-attestation.ts using gpg --verify against the key registered in APPROVAL_REQUIRED_FROM + GPG_KEY_ID in .env. If operator has no GPG key, create-attestation.ts errors with setup instructions rather than falling back.
